title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Kabir experiences a dream regarding Rukhsar's pregnancy. Subsequently, Zeenat misleads Zara regarding Kabir before Zara encounters Siraj's brother, Sartaj.

title: Promos
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Kabir is worried when he is unable to find Zara. Meanwhile, Rukhsar executes her next plan against Kabir while he learns that Zara has been abducted.

title: Promos
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Ishq Subhan Allah
desc: Sartaj restrains Zara and compels the distressed woman to undergo a marriage ceremony. Concurrently, Kabir requests police assistance to rescue her from this dire predicament.
